# Retrivio Branding Assets

This folder contains source SVG assets for GitHub profile/repo branding.

- `retrivio-mark.svg`: square app icon/avatar mark (source).
- `retrivio-social.svg`: wide social preview/banner image (source).
- `retrivio-mark-1024.png`: ready-to-upload GitHub avatar/icon export.
- `retrivio-mark-512.png`: compact icon export.
- `retrivio-social-1280x640.png`: ready-to-upload social preview export.

Notes:
- Both files are plain SVG so they can be edited in code review.
- PNG variants are generated from these SVG sources with `rsvg-convert`.
